Tests and build scripts for UI components in the Pebble firmware, including animations, dialogs, layers, and windows.

## Folders
- **[recognizer](recognizer/README.md)**: Tests and build script for recognizer components in the Pebble firmware, including state and event handling.

## Files
- **[test_action_menu_window.c](test_action_menu_window.c.md)**: Tests for the action menu window in the Pebble firmware, including setup, rendering, and various display modes.
- **[test_animation.c](test_animation.c.md)**: Tests for animation functionality in the Pebble firmware, including property animations, sequences, spawns, and various handlers.
- **[test_animation_interpolate.c](test_animation_interpolate.c.md)**: Tests for animation interpolation functions, including overrides and custom configurations.
- **[test_animation_timing.c](test_animation_timing.c.md)**: Tests for the `animation_timing_scaled` function in the Pebble firmware's animation timing module.
- **[test_content_indicator.c](test_content_indicator.c.md)**: Tests for the content indicator functionality in the Pebble firmware, including creation, configuration, and buffer management.
- **[test_emoji_fonts.c](test_emoji_fonts.c.md)**: Tests for rendering emoji fonts in different sizes using a graphics context and framebuffer.
- **[test_expandable_dialog.c](test_expandable_dialog.c.md)**: Tests for the expandable dialog UI component in the Pebble firmware, including setup, teardown, and helper functions.
- **[test_jumboji.c](test_jumboji.c.md)**: Tests for emoji detection and validation in the jumboji table using various input scenarios.
- **[test_kino_player.c](test_kino_player.c.md)**: Tests for the KinoPlayer and KinoReel components, including setup, teardown, and various animation scenarios.
- **[test_kino_reel.c](test_kino_reel.c.md)**: Tests for the Kino Reel UI component in the Pebble firmware, including resource loading and drawing.
- **[test_layer.c](test_layer.c.md)**: Unit tests for layer management functions in the Pebble firmware, including adding, removing, and traversing layers.
- **[test_layer_rect.c](test_layer_rect.c.md)**: Tests for layer rectangle resizing and synchronization behavior in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_menu_layer.c](test_menu_layer.c.md)**: Tests for the `menu_layer` component in the Pebble firmware, including selection and animation behaviors.
- **[test_menu_layer_system_cells.c](test_menu_layer_system_cells.c.md)**: Tests for rendering and verifying menu layer system cells with various configurations and dimensions.
- **[test_notification_window.c](test_notification_window.c.md)**: Tests for the notification window UI in the Pebble firmware, including rendering and scrolling behavior.
- **[test_option_menu_window.c](test_option_menu_window.c.md)**: Tests for the option menu window in the Pebble firmware, including setup, rendering, and various configurations.
- **[test_scroll_layer.c](test_scroll_layer.c.md)**: Tests for the scroll layer functionality in the Pebble firmware, including paging and scrolling behavior.
- **[test_selection_windows.c](test_selection_windows.c.md)**: Tests for time selection and time range selection windows in the Pebble firmware UI.
- **[test_simple_dialog.c](test_simple_dialog.c.md)**: Tests for the simple dialog UI component in the Pebble firmware, including setup, rendering, and validation.
- **[test_status_bar_layer.c](test_status_bar_layer.c.md)**: Tests for the status bar layer's height consistency in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_text_layer.c](test_text_layer.c.md)**: Tests for the text layer functionality in the Pebble firmware, including text flow and paging.
- **[test_text_layer_flow.c](test_text_layer_flow.c.md)**: Tests for text layer flow functionality in the Pebble firmware, including paging and overflow handling.
- **[test_timeline_peek.c](test_timeline_peek.c.md)**: Tests for the timeline peek feature in the Pebble firmware, including setup, rendering, and visibility.
- **[test_window_stack.c](test_window_stack.c.md)**: Tests for the window stack functionality in the Pebble firmware, including modal and app window interactions, transitions, and edge cases.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing various UI components in the Pebble firmware using the `clar` function.
